title: Riding the Wind
writer: Morton Grant, Earle Snell, Bernard McConville
actors: Tim Holt, Ray Whitley, Joan Barclay
plot: It's the ranchers whose cattle are dying of thirst versus Henry Dodge whose dam holds all the water. When windmills are built and they start pumping water, Dodge has them blown up. When a court order forces him to release the wate...
